must_detect.matched_text: We have received a non-binding term sheet to acquire 60% of Nimbus Arc Pte. Ltd., a DPT wallet operator with MAS in-principle approval, for S$48m cash plus S$12m earn-out.

Financing assumes a private placement at a 5–8% discount to last 5-day VWAP; such commercial terms and the DPT entry strategy are not generally available and may be price sensitive under Rule 703 of the SGX Listing Manual.

Any reference to the potential emissions restatement, crypto acquisition pipeline, or the placement pricing outside the insider group risks selective disclosure and tipping under Sections 218/219 SFA.
